sections.sectionTitle: Saltan'na Pan Ciah ding Thu Ciam

verses.text: Topa in hong hopih a
“ Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kong genin-ah: Kong gensa thute khempeuh laibu khat sungah khum in

Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, ka mi Israel leh Judah-te a saltan'na uh ka beisakkik ni a hong tung ding hi. A pu a pate uh tungah ka piaksa gamah ka tun'pihkik ding a, amaute in tua gam a tangkik ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” hong ci hi
Israel leh Judah mite tawh kisai-in hih bangin a gen hi
“ Topa in kong cihin-ah: Launa leh patauhna aw ka za a, lungnopna aw ka za kei hi
Tu-in ngaihsun dih un. Pasalte nau a suak ngei uh hiam? Tua ahih leh bang hangin pasal khempeuh in numei nausuak dingte bangin a tai uh hum ahi uh hiam? Bang hangin a mai uhah si tenglo ahi hiam
Nu e! Tua ni lianpi hong tung ding a, nidang tawh tehtheih ding hilo hi. Jakob suante' gimhun hi ding a, ahih hangin amaute suakta veve ding uh hi
“Vanglian Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua ni ciangin amau' ngawng panin a hakkolte uh ka kuaihtansak ding a, a khaute ka sutat ding hi. Amaute, gamdang mite' salin a om nawn kei ding uh hi
Topa, amau' Pasian' na ahi a, amaute' kumpipa-in ka koih ding David' na ahi zongin a semzaw ding uh hi

“Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah: Ka nasempa Jakob' suante aw, lau kei un. Israel mite aw, patau kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlapi gam panin no kong honkhia ding a, na suan na khakte uh a saltan'na uh panin ka honkhia ding hi. Jakob' suante hong ciah ding uh a, nuamtakin a tengkik ding uh hi. Kuamah in amaute a lausak nawn kei ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, a hong honkhia dingin note kong ompih hi. Note ka hong thehthangna gamte khempeuh ka susia ding a, ahih hangin note kong susia kei ding hi. A kilawm zahin kong thuhilh ding a, gim pialoin kong mawk nusiat kei ding hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah: Na liamma uh dam theilo a, na meima uh nasia mahmah hi
Note a hong don ding kuamah omlo a, na liamma uh-a' ding zatui omlo a, note' lungdamna ding bangmah omlo hi

Na lawm ngaihte un hong mangngilh khin uh a, hong don nawnlo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khialhnate uh lian lua-in, na mawhnate uh nasia lua ahih manin, galte bangin note kong bawl a, nasia takin gim kong thuaksak hi
Bang hangin na sa-in kapkap na hi uh hiam? Na natna uh a dam thei ding hilo hi. Na khialhnate uh lian lua-in, na mawhnate uh nasia lua ahih manin hih bangin note ka hong thuaksak hi
Tua ahih manin no hong thatte kithat ding a, na galte khempeuh uh salin kiman kik ding hi. No hong buluhte kibuluh ding a, no a hong mante, matin omzaw ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, na galte un note, pampaih mi pawl, hong ci-in, ‘Kuama donloh Zion na hi hi,’ hong cih uh hangin note kong cidamsak kik ding a, na liammate uh ka damsak ding hi

“ Topa in kong cihin-ah: En un, keimah in Jakob suante' bukte ka lamkik ding a, a ten'na uh ka hehpih ding hi. Khuapi zong a omnasa mualtung mahah kilamkik ding a, kumpipa' inn zong a omnasa mahah omkik ding hi
Tuate sung panin lungdamna la kisa ding a, gualnopna aw kiza ding hi. Amaute ka pungsak ding a, tawmkha bek hilo ding uh hi. Amaute ka kipahtawisak ding a, ka neusak kei ding hi
A tate uh nidang bangmahin a omkik ding uh a, a mite uh zong kiptakin ka mai-ah ka phut ding a, amau a bawlsiate gim ka pia ding hi

A kumpi ding uh amaute khat mah hi ding a, amaute a uk ding amau' sung mah panin a piang ding hi. Keimah in amah ka kai ding a, kei kiangah amah hong pai ding hi. Tua hi kei leh ama thu-in kei a hong zuan ngam ding kua om ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi
Tua ciangin note, ka mite na hi ding uh a, kei pen note' Pasian ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi
En un, Topa' huihpi nung! A hehna hong kinuai nainai-in hong paikhia ta a, migilopa' lutang hong kiden'na ding hi
A lungsim sunga a tupna teng a tangtun'sak matengin, Topa' hehna a lauhuaipi kilehkik lo ding hi. Hong pai ding hunte-ah note in na telzaw semsem ding uh hi.
